channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Arrest of Mike Defensor, Espiritu, and Marcoleta in P75-M Plunder Case
item.description: Former Anakalusugan party-list Rep. Michael Defensor and businessman Joseph Varias Espiritu, co-accused of Senator Rodante Marcoleta in the P75-million plunder case, were arrested by Interior Secretar...

item.title: Opec+ raises output targets as global oil supplies recover
item.description: Oil prices declined slightly after Opec+ agreed to increase output targets starting August, with Gulf exports through the Strait of Hormuz recovering. Brent crude fell 34 cents to $71.78 per barrel, w...

item.title: Panel Show 'Unacceptable' Criticized for Unnecessary and Controversial Content
item.description: The article reviews the BBC's panel show 'Unacceptable,' hosted by Ed Gamble and featuring comedians defending their worst opinions. The show, produced by Romesh Ranganathan's company, is criticized f...

item.title: Albanese signs Australia-Fiji defense pact amid regional security shifts
item.description: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese has finalized a significant security agreement with Fiji, marking a strategic move against Chinese influence in the Indo-Pacific region. The deal, announced during his ...

item.title: Managing a $100,000 Windfall: Financial Advice for Canadians
item.description: The article explores how to wisely manage a $100,000 inheritance, using the story of George, a Toronto-based IT manager, as a case study. Financial experts advise against impulsive spending, emphasizi...

item.title: Flight Dispatcher Salaries and Benefits in Kenya
item.description: The article details the salary ranges and benefits for flight dispatchers in Kenya. Entry-level dispatchers earn between Ksh 70,000 and Ksh 120,000, mid-level between Ksh 120,000 and Ksh 180,000, whil...

item.title: Octogenarian Shares Experience of Unwanted Compliments on Beauty
item.description: In a letter to Miss Manners, an octogenarian woman recounts her surprise and discomfort at receiving frequent compliments about her appearance from strangers. Despite being in her 80s, she has never c...

item.title: NYSC Reform and the Need for National Dialogue
item.description: The article discusses the proposed reforms for the National Youth Service Corps (NYSC), emphasizing the need for a national dialogue to address its transformation into a skills-focused development pro...

item.title: Spur Franchise Faces Labour Abuse Allegations in Cape Town
item.description: Workers at a Spur franchise in Cape Town have accused the employer of exploitative practices, including poverty wages, excessive working hours, and denial of basic workplace rights. Employees allege t...

item.title: Police Say Suspects Arrested as Investigations Continue into Alleged Plans for Violent Protests
item.description: The Tanzania Police Force has assured wananchi that the country's security situation remains stable despite allegations that a small group of individuals has been mobilising people to participate in u...

item.title: Quezon City Reports Rise in COVID-19 Cases Over Three Weeks
item.description: Quezon City experienced a significant surge in confirmed COVID-19 cases, rising from 23 to 84 in the past three weeks according to the city's epidemiology and surveillance unit. The data reveals that ...

item.title: AAP MP Sanjay Singh Alleges Political Bias in Ram Mandir Donation Probe
item.description: AAP Rajya Sabha MP Sanjay Singh has accused Vishva Hindu Parishad (VHP) president Alok Kumar of attempting to shield individuals involved in alleged financial irregularities linked to donations and co...

item.title: Ruto Defends Embu Votes, Emphasizes Long-standing Community Ties
item.description: President William Ruto has dismissed claims by former Deputy President Rigathi Gachagua that his support in Embu County was due to their political alliance, insisting his bond with the region was buil...

item.title: Cristiano Ronaldo Announces 2026 World Cup as Final Tournament
item.description: Portugal's Cristiano Ronaldo has confirmed that the 2026 FIFA World Cup will be his final appearance in the tournament, expressing his focus on enjoying the experience. The 41-year-old, speaking ahead...

item.title: UK's Next PM Faces Challenges in Managing Relations with Donald Trump
item.description: The article explores the challenges faced by Andy Burnham, the UK's next prime minister, in navigating complex relations with Donald Trump. It highlights expert advice on balancing diplomacy with firm...

item.title: Thunderstorm Flooding May Have Destroyed Family Home in Canora
item.description: A family home in Canora, Saskatchewan, may have been destroyed by severe thunderstorm flooding, according to local reports. The incident occurred on July 5, 2026, when intense weather conditions led t...

item.title: National Dialogue Steering Committee Faces Legal Challenge Over Appointment Process
item.description: The article details a legal challenge launched by nominees of South Africa's National Dialogue initiative against President Cyril Ramaphosa, alleging that the presidency failed to issue formal appoint...

item.title: The Cultural Significance of Stadium Music at the 2026 World Cup
item.description: The 2026 FIFA World Cup features carefully curated music playlists designed to enhance the stadium experience. FIFA’s stadium entertainment team collaborates with national associations to create cultu...

item.title: Lahore Police Arrest Suspects in Foreigners' Kidnap and Sexual Assault Case
item.description: Lahore police confirmed the involvement of a government minister's relative in the alleged abduction and sexual assault of two foreign women. The DIG Operations Kamran Faisal announced that all eight ...

item.title: Government Urges Public to Seek Medical Advice Only from Licensed Healthcare Professionals
item.description: The government has warned members of the public against relying on medical advice shared by unlicensed individuals on social media platforms. Health authorities said there has been a growing trend of ...
